faq_section.title: Most Common Questions
faq_section.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions right here

faqs.title: How long does a repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed within 1-2 business days. Complex cases may require additional time

faqs.title: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, bank card, online payment and installment options

faqs.title: Do you use genuine parts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we only use genuine parts approved by Apple

faqs.title: What are your warranty terms?
faqs.answer: All repairs come with a 3-6 month warranty. If any issue arises during the warranty period, we fix it free of charge

faqs.title: Do you repair water-damaged devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept devices with water damage. After diagnostics, we'll inform you of the possible solutions

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our team is here to help
